refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing, with garbage visible on the ground. The scene is set on a rainy day.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital overflowing with garbage, which is not only an eyesore but also a health hazard. The hospital should ensure that the trash is collected regularly, especially on rainy days when the smell and mess can be worse. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are overflowing, it's really gross and smells terrible, especially on a rainy day like today.
